entries.title: Independent Accounting & Audit Support Consultant
entries.description:
Maintaining books of accounts and supporting financial reporting for Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) clients
Preparing audit-ready schedules, supporting documentation, and working papers
Reviewed accounting entries and supporting documents to identify discrepancies and reporting inconsistencies
Assisting in GST, TDS, and income tax-related documentation and compliance support
achievements: Preparing audit schedules and working papers for statutory audits
Handling GST and TDS compliance documentation
Maintaining books of accounts using Tally ERP
Assisting with financial statement preparation and reconciliations

entries.title: Freelance Accounting & Business Support
entries.description:
• Maintained day-to-day bookkeeping and data entry using Tally ERP
• Assisted in the preparation of trial balances and preliminary financial summaries
• Performed bank, cash, and ledger reconciliations to ensure accuracy of records
• Reviewed invoices, vouchers, and supporting documents for accuracy and record maintenance
achievements: Managed day-to-day bookkeeping using Tally ERP
Prepared MIS reports and bank reconciliations
Handled billing, invoicing, and payment follow-ups
Coordinated with clients for document collection and compliance

entries.title: PCG Advisor –Executive
entries.description:
•	Maintained day-to-day bookkeeping and data entry using Tally ERP
•	Assisted in the preparation of trial balances and preliminary financial summaries
•	Performed bank, cash, and ledger reconciliations to ensure accuracy of records
•	Reviewed invoices, vouchers, and supporting documents for accuracy and record maintenance
achievements: Individually handling clients with a book size of 2.5 million & above
Cross-selling of other products like Mutual funds, PMS, and Insurance
Advising High Net Worth Individual clients on Equity, Derivatives, currency & commodity markets
